topics.label: Schemas & Models
topics.description: Define schemas with types, validation, and defaults. Compile to models.

topics.label: CRUD Operations
topics.description: find, findOne, create, updateOne, deleteOne. Query builders.

topics.label: Middleware (Hooks)
topics.description: pre/post hooks for save, validate, remove. Transform data on save.

topics.label: Population
topics.description: Populate references (like SQL joins). Reference and embed documents.
